steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is C, $-3.04x^2 -7x + 13.05$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

eliminationHtml:
• Choice A — $-2.2x^2 + 1.8$: Missing the $-7x$ term and wrong constant; incorrect expansion. ✗
  • Choice B — $-2.2x^2 + 11.8$: Wrong $x^2$ coefficient ($-2.2$ vs $-3.04$) and missing the $x$ term. ✗
  • Choice C — $-3.04x^2 -7x + 13.05$: Matches $-3.04x^2 - 7x + 13.05$ exactly. ✓
  • Choice D — $-3.04x^2 -7x + 0.55$: Correct $x^2$ and $x$ terms but wrong constant; likely forgot to add 6.8 back. ✗
That is the correct answer.
